lesson.title: Don't stand still. Ever.
lesson.body_md:
## Standing still kills the offense

When you stop moving, your defender stops watching you. They sag in and clog the lane. Your job off the ball is simple:

```takeaway
Make your defender pick: watch you or watch the ball. They can't do both.
```

## Two moves you'll use forever

### 1) Cut
A cut is a hard sprint to a new spot. Three rules:

- **Sudden.** Walk, walk, walk, then EXPLODE.
- **Toward something.** Pass, screen, or the rim. Never random.
- **All the way.** Half-cuts get half-help.

### 2) Relocate
After you pass the ball, slide to a new spot. The defense moves with the ball — go to the space they leave.

```tip
If you pass and stand still, your defender just got a free helper.
```

## When defender looks away

```reveal
Q: Your defender turned their head to watch the ball. What do you do?
A: Backdoor cut. Sprint to the rim before they look back. They can't guard what they can't see.
```

## Test yourself

```quiz
Q: You just passed to your teammate at the wing. Your defender stares at the ball. What do you do?
- Stand still ✗
- Backdoor cut to the rim ✓
- Run to the corner with no plan ✗
Why: A defender who stops watching you is begging to be cut on. Make them pay.
```

```quiz
Q: Your point guard drives hard right toward the rim. You're on the right wing. What do you do?
- Stand on the wing ✗
- Lift to the slot for a kick-out ✓
- Cut to the same spot as the driver ✗
Why: When the drive comes at you, give the driver an outlet by lifting. Two players in the same spot = clogged drive.
```

## The 4 cuts every player should know

1. **Basket cut** — defender's eyes on the ball? Sprint backdoor.
2. **45 cut** — from the wing, slash through the gap.
3. **Replace cut** — teammate cuts through; you fill their spot.
4. **Lift cut** — from the corner, lift up to give a kick-out.

```mistake
Two players cutting into the lane at the same time. Now nobody can drive.
Fix: one cutter at a time. Wait your turn.
```

```takeaway
If you're not cutting or relocating, you're a cone.
```

## Coach says

```coach
Move on every pass. Move on every drive. Move with a purpose.
```

Now try it in practice.
